description: ENA 4050: Fragments of a letter from Shemuel Gaon b. Hofni to one of the community leaders in Qayrawan. Around 1008. Maybe was addressed to the Nagid, Avraham b. Ata. Describes the agreement between the writer and Sharira Gaon and the warning from transferring money to the other Yeshiva, Pumbedita, meaning the Yeshiva of the writer’s son in-law, Hayya Gaon. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #52) VMR
description_he: שרידי מכתב משמואל גאון בן חופני לאחד ממנהיגי קיירואן, כ-1008, על ההסכם בינו לבין שרירא גאון
